milestones.title: Repository initialized with Codex harness
milestones.description: Root harness files, shared docs, and all module documentation skeletons exist in the repository.
milestones.evidence: Root AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/*.md, shared/types.py, module docs, and init.sh added.
gate: Root AGENTS.md exists
All four modules contain AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, SETUP.md, and feature_list.json
docs/INTERFACES.md defines all cross-module contracts
init.sh exists and passes bash syntax check

milestones.title: Modules runnable in isolation with mock-friendly setup
milestones.description: Each module can bootstrap its own environment and document a mock strategy before integration.
gate: Frontend local startup command documented and runnable
Chatbot supports USE_MOCK=true
LoRA setup and storage locations are documented
RAG setup and Milvus local bootstrap are documented

milestones.title: Interfaces finalized and shared types aligned
milestones.description: Provider and consumer teams agree on all payloads, return shapes, and shared enums.
milestones.evidence: Initial contracts and shared types committed during repository initialization.
gate: No unresolved type conflicts between docs/INTERFACES.md and shared/types.py
DocumentSource includes all RAG source categories
Mock behavior is documented for every consumed interface

milestones.title: LoRA and RAG integration-ready
milestones.description: Both provider modules expose real interfaces usable by Chatbot without mock mode.
gate: LoRA interface functions callable with documented inputs
RAG interface functions callable with documented inputs
Provider verification evidence recorded in module trackers

milestones.title: Chatbot integrated with real providers
milestones.description: Chatbot disables mocks and completes end-to-end pipeline execution using real LoRA and RAG interfaces.
gate: USE_MOCK=false path verified
/api/chat returns reply, sentiment, entities, and sources
/api/health reports lora and rag as ok

milestones.title: Frontend end-to-end integration
milestones.description: Frontend runs against the real Chatbot API and covers the main chat flow and dashboard summary flow.
gate: Frontend chat UI sends requests to the real API
Sentiment summary page consumes backend data
User-visible failure states are handled

milestones.title: Demo-ready full-system flow
milestones.description: Full system works without mocks and is ready for evaluation and presentation.
gate: Full chat flow works without mocks
Retrieval and sentiment outputs are visible in the system
Known risks are documented in progress.md or session-handoff.md
